description_long: This shotgun features a sleek, elongated barrel with a matte metallic finish and a synthetic black stock. The barrel is relatively thin and long, with a front sight bead visible at the muzzle. The receiver area includes a rail for mounting optics or accessories, and the trigger guard is rounded and proportionally sized for finger access. The stock is a full, straight design with a textured buttpad for shoulder support. The overall design is modern and utilitarian, with minimal decorative elements and a focus on functionality.
description: A modern shotgun with a long metallic barrel, black synthetic full stock, and a rail for optics.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, including the black stock, metallic barrel, and rail on top.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the narrow barrel profile and the front sight bead at the muzzle.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same features as view 0, with the stock and barrel clearly visible.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the width of the stock and the alignment of the barrel, with the buttpad visible.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, long and slender with a front sight bead and no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with smooth edges and no visible finger grooves or reinforcement
